entryCondition: The product owner directly requested multiple separately saved characters within one project and complete execution through the product-update pipeline on 2026-07-22.
note: UPD-004 activates the multiplicity already reserved by recipeIds and separate recipe records. It retains character recipe v1, project schema v2, archive v1/v2/v3, terrain v1, pack formats, and the 18-method Electron bridge.
